member.name: P:CommunicationService.Contracts.Notifications.ChannelRequestDto.TemplateCode
member.summary: Optional template code; when set, subject/body are resolved from COM_NotificationTemplate.

member.name: T:CommunicationService.Contracts.Notifications.CreateNotificationRequestDto
member.summary: Creates a notification intent, recipients, delivery channels, and enqueues for processing.

member.name: P:CommunicationService.Contracts.Notifications.CreateNotificationRequestDto.Context
member.summary: Key-value pairs merged into templates as {{key}} placeholders.

member.name: P:CommunicationService.Contracts.Notifications.CreateNotificationRequestDto.StatusReferenceValueId
member.summary: When null, defaults to configured draft/queued status.

member.name: T:CommunicationService.Contracts.Notifications.INotificationApiClient
member.summary: HTTP client contract for other microservices (no direct SMTP/SMS calls outside CommunicationService).

member.name: T:CommunicationService.Contracts.Notifications.SendTemplateNotificationRequestDto
member.summary: Convenience payload for a single template + channel send.
